title: Agent Hive Configuration
description: Configuration schema for Agent Hive config files. User/session policy is read from ~/.config/opencode/agent_hive.json. Project files at <project>/.hive/agent-hive.json, or legacy <project>/.opencode/agent_hive.json, are overlays for project-scoped fields only: sandbox, dockerImage, persistentContainers, and repositories. If the project config is invalid, Hive surfaces a runtime warning and uses the global config/defaults.

$schema.description: Schema reference for this config file

sandbox.description: Project-scoped sandbox isolation mode. 'none' runs commands directly; 'docker' wraps bash commands in Docker containers.

dockerImage.description: Project-scoped Docker image to use for sandbox. Auto-detected from project files if omitted (e.g., node:22-slim for Node.js projects).

persistentContainers.description: Reuse Docker containers per worktree (docker exec) instead of creating new ones per command (docker run --rm). Default: true when sandbox is 'docker'.

repositories.description: Project-scoped repository manifest. Entries identify git repositories by a safe lowercase ID and a project-relative or absolute path. Global manifests are ignored for orchestration.

enableToolsFor.description: Globally enable hive tools for specific features. Read from the global user config; project-local values are ignored by runtime config resolution.

disableSkills.description: Globally disable specific Hive bundled skills (e.g., ['brainstorming', 'writing-plans']). Read from the global user config; project-local values are ignored by runtime config resolution. Disabled skills are excluded from Hive materialization and Hive bundled autoload. Does not block user or native skills with the same name.

disableMcps.description: Globally disable specific MCP servers (e.g., ['websearch', 'ast_grep']). Read from the global user config; project-local values are ignored by runtime config resolution. Available: websearch, context7, grep_app, ast_grep

agentMode.description: Agent specialization mode. Read from the global user config; project-local values are ignored by runtime config resolution. 'unified' (default) uses a single hybrid agent for all roles; 'dedicated' uses specialized agents for each role.

hook_cadence.description: Global hook execution cadence configuration. Read from the global user config; project-local values are ignored by runtime config resolution. Key = hook name, Value = number of turns between invocations (1 = every turn, 3 = every 3rd turn). All hooks default to 1.

additionalProperties.description: Number of turns between hook invocations

agents.description: Global agent model configuration overrides. Project-local values are ignored by runtime config resolution.

customAgents.description: Global custom Hive subagent definitions derived from scout-researcher, forager-worker, plan-reviewer, code-reviewer, simplicity-reviewer, or approach-advisor. Project-local values are ignored by runtime config resolution. IDs cannot reuse built-in or plugin-reserved names.

id.description: Safe repository ID used as a path segment and branch component (for example, api, web-ui, data.v2).

path.description: Project-relative or absolute path to a git repository.

skills.description: Legacy field kept for config compatibility. Native skill visibility is controlled by OpenCode skills.paths registration and disableSkills, not by per-agent skills allowlists.

autoLoadSkills.description: Native discovered or Hive bundled skill names to advertise in this agent prompt as high-priority skill tool load guidance. Native/user skills are resolved by frontmatter name and take precedence over Hive bundles.

variant.description: Variant key for model reasoning/effort level (e.g., 'low', 'medium', 'high', 'max'). Must match a key in opencode.json provider.<provider>.models.<model>.variants

baseAgent.description: Built-in Hive agent to inherit prompt/tools/permissions from

description.description: Human-facing description injected into delegation guidance

variant.description: Variant override for model reasoning/effort level

autoLoadSkills.description: Additional native discovered or Hive bundled skill names to advertise in this custom agent prompt as high-priority skill tool load guidance. Merged with inherited base autoLoadSkills; disableSkills only suppresses Hive bundled guidance/materialization, not native/user skills with the same name.
